title: Edit → reserialize → validate loop is documented in the skill

steps.body: Open the agent skill and confirm the reserialize loop guidance is present and accurate, so an agent following the skill can execute the edit → reserialize → read-delta loop end-to-end.

steps.title: Expected outcomes
items: The mutate/gate tool list includes unity_open_mcp_reserialize
An "Example: reserialize after direct YAML edits" section exists with workflow steps (edit → reserialize → read delta)
The example includes a request payload and a response envelope (mutation + gate + agentNextSteps)
The supported-extensions list (.prefab/.unity/.asset/.mat/.controller/.anim) and the whole-project-not-supported caveat are present
No internal milestone IDs leak into the rendered skill text

reset.note: Documentation-only scenario; no fixtures or artifacts to revert.
